title: Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents
summary:
Agent Safehouse provides macOS-native sandboxing for local AI agents, addressing the risk of destructive errors from probabilistic LLMs. It enforces a "deny-first" access model via the macOS kernel, blocking syscalls before agents can access or modify unauthorized files. This means agents are denied write access outside a designated project directory and cannot read sensitive areas like `~/.ssh` or `~/other-repos`, making operations "0% chance" of disaster.

The tool ensures agents work perfectly within their sandbox, with automatic read/write access to the current project directory and read access to installed toolchains. Getting started is simple: download a single Bash script and run your agent command inside `safehouse`. The article demonstrates how unauthorized file access is denied by the kernel, while permitted operations within the project succeed.

For enhanced workflow, users can configure shell functions to automatically run their preferred agents (e.g., Claude, Codex, Gemini) within Safehouse by default, with an option to bypass the sandbox when needed. Advanced users can even leverage LLMs to generate custom, least-privilege `sandbox-exec` profiles tailored to their specific home directory and toolchain setup, ensuring maximum security and control. Safehouse aims to enable developers to "move fast, break nothing" by making agent interactions safe by default.
chinese_title: 代理安全屋 – 针对本地代理的macOS原生沙盒
chinese_summary:
Agent Safehouse 为本地AI代理提供 macOS 原生沙盒机制，解决概率性大语言模型可能造成的破坏性错误的风险。它通过 macOS 内核强制执行“默认拒绝”访问模型，在代理访问或修改未经授权的文件之前阻止系统调用。这意味着代理被拒绝在指定项目目录之外的写入权限，并且无法读取诸如 `~/.ssh` 或 `~/other-repos` 等敏感区域，从而确保操作零风险。

该工具确保代理在其沙盒内完美运行，自动拥有对当前项目目录的读写权限，以及对已安装工具链的读取权限。入门简单：下载一个Bash脚本，并在 `safehouse` 中运行你的代理命令即可。文章演示了内核如何拒绝未经授权的文件访问，而项目内的允许操作则成功执行。

为了优化工作流程，用户可以配置shell函数，默认在Safehouse中自动运行他们偏好的代理（例如，Claude、Codex、Gemini），并可选择在需要时绕过沙盒。高级用户甚至可以利用大语言模型生成定制的、最小权限的 `sandbox-exec` 配置文件，根据他们特定的主目录和工具链设置进行调整，确保最大的安全性和控制。Safehouse 旨在通过默认使代理交互安全，从而使开发者能够“快速行动，不破坏任何东西”。

title: Ireland shuts last coal plant, becomes 15th coal-free country in Europe (2025)
summary:
The provided text is a critical commentary on Ireland's announced move to become a coal-free country by shutting its last coal plant in 2025. While acknowledging the intent to be "climate kind," the author questions the genuine environmental benefit if Ireland were to continue burning coal, but instead import it from other nations.

The central argument is that mining coal elsewhere (e.g., Poland), transporting it via ships and trucks to Ireland, and then burning it, would actually exacerbate pollution due to the added emissions from global logistics. The author likens this to an absurd scenario of felling the Amazon rainforest to supply an Irish power plant. Ultimately, the commenter views such a policy as "token climate care," merely creating an appearance of environmental responsibility while potentially expanding the overall carbon footprint by shifting and increasing the problem elsewhere.
chinese_title: 爱尔兰关闭最后一座燃煤电厂，成为欧洲第15个无煤国家 (2025年)
chinese_summary: 这段文字是对爱尔兰宣布将于2025年关闭其最后一座燃煤电厂，从而成为一个无煤国家的举动所做的批判性评论。尽管承认其“对气候友好”的初衷，作者却质疑，如果爱尔兰继续燃烧煤炭，但转而从其他国家进口，这是否具有真正的环境效益。核心论点是，在他处（例如波兰）开采煤炭，通过船舶和卡车运到爱尔兰，然后再燃烧，这种做法实际上会因全球物流产生的额外排放而加剧污染。作者将此比作一个荒谬的场景：为了供应爱尔兰的一座发电厂而砍伐亚马逊雨林。最终，评论者认为这种政策是“象征性的气候关怀”，仅仅是制造出一种环保责任的表象，同时却可能通过将问题转移并加剧到其他地方，从而扩大整体碳足迹。

title: FrameBook
summary:
The "FrameBook" project involved retrofitting a 2006 black MacBook (model A1181) chassis with modern internal components, drawing inspiration from retrofitting old Macs and PCs. The creator sourced beat-up MacBooks and OEM chassis parts, aiming to merge nostalgic aesthetics with current performance.

Key components included a Framework Laptop 13 Mainboard (Intel i7-1280P, 64GB RAM), a CSOT display panel, Framework speakers, an 8MP webcam, and various USB hubs. Significant challenges arose during integration: the original keyboard and trackpad were made functional by soldering a USB-C cable to its PCB, marking the creator's first soldering experience. Custom 3D printed standoffs, secured with super glue, were used for internal mounting.

The I/O ports required extensive modification; the left side was dremeled out to house stripped USB hubs, covered by a custom 3D printed I/O shield. The right side utilized the old DVD drive slot for a USB-C hub. A custom-made LED was installed to replicate the iconic glowing Apple logo. The webcam and power button also required custom integration.

The three-month project taught the creator soldering and 3D modeling skills. Despite acknowledging some "janky" aspects, such as the reliance on super glue for mounting, and a desire for custom PCBs, the "FrameBook" successfully created a unique, functional laptop that marries classic design with modern hardware.
chinese_title: 框架书
chinese_summary:
“FrameBook”项目涉及将2006年黑色MacBook（型号A1181）的机箱改装为现代内部组件，灵感来源于改装旧Mac和PC。创作者采购了旧的MacBook和OEM机箱部件，旨在将怀旧美学与当前性能相结合。

主要组件包括一个Framework Laptop 13主板（Intel i7-1280P，64GB RAM）、一块CSOT显示面板、Framework扬声器、一个8MP网络摄像头和各种USB集线器。在集成过程中出现了重大挑战：通过将USB-C线焊接到其PCB上，使原装键盘和触控板恢复功能，这是创作者的首次焊接体验。内部安装使用了定制的3D打印支架，并用强力胶固定。

I/O端口需要大量修改；左侧被用电磨工具挖空，以容纳拆下的USB集线器，并由定制的3D打印I/O挡板覆盖。右侧利用了旧的DVD光驱槽来安装USB-C集线器。安装了一个定制的LED，以重现标志性的发光苹果标志。网络摄像头和电源按钮也需要定制集成。

这个为期三个月的项目让创作者学会了焊接和3D建模技能。尽管承认存在一些“粗糙”之处，例如内部安装依赖强力胶，以及希望拥有定制PCB，“FrameBook”项目仍成功地创造了一款独特、功能齐全的笔记本电脑，将经典设计与现代硬件完美结合。

title: How to run Qwen 3.5 locally
summary:
This article provides a comprehensive guide to running Alibaba's Qwen 3.5 LLM family locally, which includes models from 0.8B to 397B parameters. These multimodal LLMs boast strong performance, 256K context, support 201 languages, and excel in agentic coding, vision, chat, and long-context tasks.

Recent updates feature improved GGUF quantization with Unsloth Dynamic 2.0, enhancing chat, coding, long context, and tool-calling capabilities. Hardware requirements vary widely: 0.8B models need as little as 3GB RAM, while the 397B-A17B model can require up to 810GB for BF16, or 256GB for 4-bit quantization. Users should ensure total memory (VRAM + system RAM) exceeds the model file size for optimal performance.

Qwen 3.5 supports "Thinking" and "Non-thinking" modes, each with recommended `temperature`, `top_p`, `top_k`, `min_p`, and `presence_penalty` settings for general or precise coding/reasoning tasks. Small models (0.8B-9B) default to disabled thinking, which can be toggled using `--chat-template-kwargs '{"enable_thinking":true/false}'`.

Local inference is primarily performed using `llama.cpp` for CPU/GPU, or `LM Studio` for a GUI-based approach. The process involves obtaining `llama.cpp`, downloading GGUF models (e.g., UD-Q4_K_XL) via Hugging Face, and running them with specific commands tailored to model size and desired thinking mode. LM Studio users download models and may need to enable a "Thinking" toggle via a YAML file. For production, `llama-server` is recommended. Note that Qwen 3.5 GGUFs are currently incompatible with Ollama.
chinese_title: 如何在本地运行Qwen 3.5
chinese_summary:
本文提供了在本地运行阿里巴巴通义千问 3.5 大语言模型系列（包括从 0.8B 到 397B 参数的模型）的全面指南。这些多模态大语言模型性能卓越，支持 256K 上下文、201 种语言，并在智能体编程、视觉、聊天和长文本任务方面表现出色。

最新更新通过 Unsloth Dynamic 2.0 改进了 GGUF 量化，增强了聊天、编程、长上下文和工具调用能力。硬件要求差异很大：0.8B 模型只需 3GB 内存，而 397B-A17B 模型在 BF16 模式下可能需要高达 810GB，4 位量化下则需要 256GB。用户应确保总内存（显存 + 系统内存）超过模型文件大小，以获得最佳性能。

通义千问 3.5 支持“思考”和“非思考”模式，每种模式都为通用或精确的编程/推理任务推荐了 `temperature`、`top_p`、`top_k`、`min_p` 和 `presence_penalty` 设置。小型模型（0.8B-9B）默认禁用思考模式，可以通过 `--chat-template-kwargs '{"enable_thinking":true/false}'` 进行切换。

本地推理主要通过 `llama.cpp` 实现 CPU/GPU 运行，或使用 `LM Studio` 这种基于图形用户界面的方法。该过程包括获取 `llama.cpp`、通过 Hugging Face 下载 GGUF 模型（例如 UD-Q4_K_XL），并使用根据模型大小和所需思考模式定制的特定命令运行它们。LM Studio 用户下载模型后，可能需要通过 YAML 文件启用“思考”模式切换。对于生产环境，推荐使用 `llama-server`。请注意，通义千问 3.5 的 GGUF 模型目前与 Ollama 不兼容。

title: Put the zip code first
summary:
The article passionately argues for placing the ZIP code first in online address forms, criticizing current widespread practices as inefficient and outdated. It highlights that a 5-digit US ZIP code can instantly determine and autofill the city, state, and country, saving users from manually entering these fields and navigating lengthy dropdown menus.

The author demonstrates that this functionality is a "solved problem," requiring only a few lines of code leveraging free APIs (like `zippopotam.us`). Placing the ZIP code first also dramatically improves street address autocomplete by significantly narrowing the search scope, leading to faster, more accurate data entry and cleaner data for companies.

The article outlines a "hall of shame" for common form design failures: putting the ZIP last without using it for autofill (e.g., Amazon, Target), collecting ZIP but doing nothing with it, offering unsearchable scrollable country dropdowns (especially when "United States" is misfiled), and forms that reset progress upon hitting the back button.

Additional recommendations include using `inputmode="numeric"` for numerical fields to invoke the correct mobile keyboard, and working with browser autofill using appropriate `autocomplete` attributes. While conceding that country selection might precede the postal code for international contexts (potentially pre-filled via IP), the core message remains: stop making users type information that can be easily known or inferred. The author implores developers to implement this simple, beneficial change, ending with a call to "Put it first, you animals."
chinese_title: 邮编放前面
chinese_summary:
这篇文章热情地倡导在在线地址表单中将邮政编码放在首位，批评当前普遍存在的做法低效且过时。文章强调，一个5位数的美国邮政编码可以立即确定并自动填充城市、州和国家，从而省去用户手动输入这些字段以及浏览冗长下拉菜单的麻烦。

作者指出，这项功能是一个“已解决的问题”，只需利用免费API（如 `zippopotam.us`）的几行代码即可实现。将邮政编码放在首位还能大幅缩小搜索范围，显著提高街道地址的自动补全功能，从而实现更快、更准确的数据录入，并为公司提供更清晰的数据。

文章列出了常见表单设计失败的“耻辱榜”：将邮政编码放在最后且不用于自动填充（例如亚马逊、Target），收集了邮政编码却不利用它，提供无法搜索、只能滚动的国家下拉菜单（特别是当“美国”被错误归类时），以及点击返回按钮时会重置进度的表单。

其他建议包括对数字字段使用 `inputmode="numeric"` 以调出正确的手机键盘，以及利用适当的 `autocomplete` 属性与浏览器自动填充功能配合。尽管作者承认在国际情境下，国家选择可能需要先于邮政编码（并可能通过IP预填充），但核心信息依然是：不要再让用户输入那些可以轻易得知或推断的信息。作者恳请开发者实施这一简单而有益的改变，最后呼吁道：“把它放在首位，你们这些家伙！”
